commit.message:
feat: restore minimized terminal windows on Open click (#49)

* feat: restore minimized terminal windows on Open click

Use System Events AXMinimized attribute to unminimize windows
in activate_app_fallback. Fixes Ghostty and other terminals
(Alacritty, kitty, Warp, etc.) that stay minimized on Open.
Also add Ghostty .app bundle path detection.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: wrap AXMinimized in try/end try for graceful fallback

AXMinimized requires Accessibility permission and may throw.
Wrapping in try/end try ensures activate always succeeds.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: restore thinking toggle in conversation preview (#45)

Re-add the thinking block toggle (◇) that was removed in #38. The
original removal assumed JSONL files never contain thinking blocks,
but they do when Claude Code has extended thinking enabled.

Restores the toggle button in both ExpandedCardOverlay (live sessions)
and HistoryCardOverlay (session history), along with thinking entries
in the MessageNavMap sidebar navigation.

commit.message:
Fix: Multiple syntax errors preventing plugin from loading

Fixed critical syntax errors:
- src/Loader.php:15 - Removed extra space in $this->pluginMeta assignment
- src/ClassLoader.php:13 - Corrected namespace from SwofShippingVendors to TrsVendors
- swof-shipping.php:41 - Corrected Guard class namespace to TrsVendors

These fixes resolve the parse error that prevented the plugin from loading
in WordPress, which was why it didn't appear in the admin sidebar.

commit.message:
fix: health monitor false disconnects — parse v2 format, fail-open

- listAllInstanceStates: parse Evolution v2 flat format (name, connectionStatus)
  instead of v1 nested format (instance.instanceName, instance.state)
- syncInstanceStates: skip sync when Evolution returns empty list (fail-open)
- syncInstanceStates: skip instances not in Evolution list instead of assuming disconnected
- Only mark DISCONNECTED when Evolution confirms state=close (not on undefined/unknown)

Fixes loop: health sync → false DISCONNECTED → reconnect → webhook CONNECTED → repeat

commit.message:
Fix 403 after deploy: chown symlink for nginx disable_symlinks if_not_owner

Nginx's disable_symlinks if_not_owner (Plesk default) requires every
path component to be owned by the same user. The 'current' symlink was
created as root, causing 403 Forbidden. Now chown -h after each switch.

Also enable composer_install step by default for new domains.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

docs: add architecture decisions review, update migration plan

Challenge 8 major decisions in the migration plan and document
alternatives considered with final rationale:

- FSD architecture: keep (AI-assisted dev benefits from rigid structure)
- Zustand: defer to Stage 3 (use URL state + React context first)
- Server Actions scope: leave open (resolve alongside streaming in Stage 3)
- Stream protocol: evaluate Vercel AI SDK before building custom
- node-cron: keep with idempotency, SIGTERM, and logging safeguards
- Build order: keep as-is (Bubble proves integrations work)
- Dev backends: separate Supabase/Weaviate; share stateless services
- Authorization: keep centralized but use direct imports, no dispatcher

Migration plan updated: FSD rationale, AI SDK as streaming option,
simplified auth pattern, node-cron safeguards, dev instance table,
deferred state management, and updated entity client state mapping.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix go install @latest by embedding selfspecs from root package

go:generate copied selfspecs into cmd/specdown/skills/ at build time,
but those generated files were .gitignored. This made `go install @latest`
fail because go install does not run go generate.

Move the embed directives to a root-level package (skills.go) that can
directly embed selfspecs/ without copying, eliminating the go:generate
step entirely.

Fixes #2

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: create in-process helper window so TrackPopupMenuEx works in console app

GetConsoleWindow() returns an HWND owned by conhost.exe/Windows Terminal
(a different process), causing TrackPopupMenuEx to fail silently.
Fix: register a minimal WS_POPUP window class and create a 1x1 hidden
window in our own process/thread to use as the owner HWND. The helper
window is created before and destroyed after each menu invocation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(scout): SABnzbd addurl integration + magnet link resolve

Task 7 (real feature): replace triggerProwlarrGrab history-polling
with direct SABnzbd addurl API submission. Prowlarr's /download
endpoint was redirecting NZBs without submitting to a download
client. Now Curatarr calls POST {sabUrl}/api?mode=addurl&name=<prowlarr_url>
and SABnzbd fetches the NZB from Prowlarr directly (same Docker
network). Returns { queued: true, via: 'sabnzbd' }. Adds sabUrl/
sabApiKey settings in Scout settings UI (alongside Prowlarr section).

Task 8 (real feature): resolve Prowlarr proxy magnetUrl to real
magnet:?xt=urn:btih:... URI via new POST /api/scout/resolve-magnet
endpoint. Prowlarr's magnetUrl proxy returns HTTP 301 → actual
magnet URI. Backend follows redirect (redirect: 'manual'), returns
Location header to UI. UI handleCopyMagnet now resolves via backend
before copying. Magnet button no longer falls back to downloadUrl.

- Unit test updated (send-to-sab now expects via: 'sabnzbd')
- E2E fixture: SABnzbd mock server added, sabUrl/sabApiKey seeded
- E2E scout tests updated to match new SABnzbd flow
- Live verified: SABnzbd queue accepted 300 Rise of an Empire NZB
- Live verified: resolve-magnet returns magnet:?xt=urn:btih:B6C6CB...

commit.message:
fix: expose all workspace DM conversations in dashboard (#510)

* fix: expose all workspace DM conversations in dashboard threads

The /api/threads endpoint was using agent-scoped get_dms() which only
returned DMs where the broker was a participant. Switch to workspace-level
get_all_dms() using RelayCast::all_dm_conversations() + dm_messages()
so all DM conversations between any agents are visible in the dashboard.

Also enhance derive_thread_name() to use the participants array for
"AgentA ↔ AgentB" display names on non-broker DM conversations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* style: auto-format Rust code with cargo fmt

commit.message:
fix(issues): fix infinite re-render loop in IssuesScreen

Zustand selector returning an object literal creates a new reference on every
render, causing Zustand to trigger another update → infinite loop.
Split into two separate scalar selectors to avoid the issue.

commit.message:
feat: fault-tolerant Jarvis supervisor + self-healing daemon

Supervisor (jarvis-supervisor.mjs):
- Auto-restarts daemon on crash with escalating backoff (1s → 30s)
- Health monitoring via heartbeat (90s stall detection → restart)
- Rate-limited restarts (max 10/hr to avoid crash loops)
- Graceful shutdown propagation (SIGINT/SIGTERM → child)
- Activity logging of all restart events

Self-healing in daemon:
- Context overflow detection (nuke history if >8K chars)
- Stream error recovery (clear history, retry)
- Consecutive error detection (2+ errors → fresh context)
- Escalating backoff on rate limits (5s → 10s → 15s)
- Reduced tool result truncation (500 chars from 800)
- Heartbeat every 30s for supervisor stall detection

Root cause: shared memory grew large with research data, read_memory
key=all returned huge payloads that blew past Groq 12K TPM limit after
5 tool rounds. Now: tighter context limits + overflow detection.

Tests: 138/138 passing

Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code)
via [Happy](https://happy.engineering)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
Co-Authored-By: Happy <yesreply@happy.engineering>
